zohoProductPageLayout.zohoPageTitle: Facility Management & CAFM Software in Dubai: CAFM Pro
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoIntroText: Get your property maintenance under control with smart preventive and breakdown automation.
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoHighlightSectionText: A practical, UAE-made CAFM tool designed to maximize asset life through a responsive browser-based experience.
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoHighlightSectionTitle: Enforce maintenance schedulesand keep your assets running.

zohoModuleList.zohoModuleListText: Take control of your helpdesk with a structured ticketing system that tracks every issue from the first complaint to the final fix. Manage specific Service Level Agreements (SLAs) through our responsive web interface to ensure your team remains responsive and accountable throughout the entire ticket life-cycle.

The core of CAFM Pro is the enforcement of preventive maintenance schedules. Systematize your recurring tasks and coordinate both in-house teams and external contractors via browser-based access, ensuring critical assets are serviced before they fail.

Manage your entire financial relationship within the FM cycle, from main contracts with landlords to sub-contracts with specialized vendors. This module automates complex billing cycles and tracks coverage details, making it a perfect fit for mid-sized FM companies managing multiple sites.

Maintain a comprehensive register of every asset, including its warranty status, maintenance history, and current valuation. The system also tracks multiple stores for parts and consumables, ensuring your technicians always have the right tools for the job without overstocking.

Move beyond basic spreadsheets with advanced Power BI integration. Generate insightful reports on resource performance, issue analysis, and asset depreciation to provide stakeholders with a “Single Source of Truth” regarding property health.

zohoEngagementModelList.zohoEngagementModelListText: We analyze your current workflows and specific site reporting requirements.
Mapping your site architecture to our product modules for an optimal fit.
Setting up the web environment and configuring the SQL database for your data.
Rigorous testing and secure transfer of your existing asset and tenant data.
On-site user training for our browser-based platform to ensure full organizational adoption.

zohoProductPageLayout.zohoWhyPartnerSectionTitle: emQube Expertise: 20 Years of Local Innovation
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoWhyPartnerSectionText: Since 2003, emQube has been a fixture in Dubai’s software landscape, specializing in business applications that solve regional operational challenges. As core developers, we provide the domain expertise to fine-tune CAFM Pro to your specific business logic, ensuring your maintenance goals are met with precision.

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: Our property management application tracks outsourced service contractor performance by logging exact timestamps from the moment a technician accepts a ticket to final job resolution. By measuring these field activities against your custom service level agreements, the system generates real-time compliance scorecards automatically for management.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: How does CAFM Pro help our property management team track the performance of outsourced service contractors?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: Tenants and occupants can log maintenance issues directly into the system through an intuitive, browser-based service portal without downloading any complex applications. They simply submit complaints online, upload photos of the issue, and follow active job status updates in real time.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: Can residents and tenants log their own complaints directly into the system using a web browser?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: A browser-based property management application removes the need for local server installations, giving your operations team secure access from any connected device. Updates roll out instantly across your entire network, ensuring your data syncs smoothly across branches without requiring manual database backups or installations.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: What are the main operational benefits of a modern browser-based application over older desktop software?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: The platform assigns a distinct tracking profile to every building asset, recording full repair histories, manufacturer warranty conditions, and preventive upkeep schedules. This asset intelligence alerts your teams before a contract expires, helping you make smart replacement decisions based on lifecycle values of assets.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: How does the application log the historical breakdown records and warranty conditions of specific building assets?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: Yes, the application features an integrated inventory management engine designed to log spare parts movements across separate physical stock locations. It monitors minimal stock values, issues automated reorder alerts, and calculates component usage costs per maintenance ticket to protect your operating margins effectively.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: Is this utility software suitable for tracking spare parts across multiple physical stock warehouses?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: We construct custom data pipelines that allow you to modify your Power BI reporting dashboards to align with existing corporate template formats. This flexibility helps you export polished operational insights, cost trends, and asset utilization parameters for executive presentation decks seamlessly for your internal review.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: Can our management team customize the Power BI reporting layouts to match our specific client templates?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: On-site technical crews access an optimized mobile interface to view active breakdown assignments, log material usage, and capture client signatures. This lightweight architecture ensures quick screen updates and data transfer, allowing teams to manage tasks smoothly without heavy data consumption while in the field.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: How do on-site technical crews receive breakdown alerts and update work orders while moving between properties?

zohoFaqList.zohoFaqAnswer: The deployment roadmap is determined by the total number of managed facilities, current asset record organization, and necessary custom reporting flows. While configuring a foundational asset logging system can take around 6 to 12 weeks, migrating extensive multi-site property records safely requires planned progression.
zohoFaqList.zohoFaqQuestion: What factors drive the overall deployment schedule for a localized facility management implementation?

zohoProductPageLayout.zohoCtaText: Book a Free CAFM Demo Session with emQube
zohoProductPageLayout.zohoCtaTitle: Ready to invest in a FM software?

realWorldResults.description:
CAFM Pro is a high-performance, web application developed entirely in Dubai, succeeding our earlier desktop versions to meet today’s flexible operational needs. Built on a robust SQL database, it provides the technical stability required to manage complex property portfolios, from residential towers and communities to industrial plants and campuses.

We understand that FM teams need software that is “easy on the eye and the mind”. That is why we focused on a clean, modern interface accessible from any mobile or desktop browser, offering the essential tools for maintenance without the “bells and whistles” that often lead to user confusion. By integrating flexible Power BI reporting, we give you the clear data needed to satisfy stakeholders who demand transparency and reliable maintenance standards.
realWorldResults.title: CAFM Pro by emQube: Built for Real-World Results
